```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library("vtree")
library("dplyr")
```

# Source

https://www.who.int/data/gho

# License

https://www.who.int/about/policies/publishing/data-policy/terms-and-conditions

```{r}
d <- read.csv("WHO_indicators.csv")
```


Country is an unit of analysis in that data set. 
Tob, PA, Alc, Diab are vars indicating if a policy on a disease exists in the country. 

```{r}
dd <- d |> 
  mutate(Tob = 1 * (Tob == "Yes"), 
         PA = 1 * (PA == "Yes"),
         Alc = 1 * (Alc == "Yes"), 
         Diab = 1 * (Diab == "Yes"))

UpSetR::upset(dd, order.by = "freq")
```


```{r}
vtree(dd, "Tob PA Alc Diab", pattern = T)
```


For quantifying intersections Jaccard index can be used. 

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jaccard_index
